description: This file defines React UI components including Button, Input, and Badge with customizable styles and behaviors.

methods.name: cx
methods.description: Utility function to conditionally join class names into a single string.

methods.name: Button
methods.description: A styled button component with variants and sizes for consistent UI.

methods.description: A labeled input component with styling and optional label.

methods.name: Badge
methods.description: A small badge component for tags or notifications.
